title: dactylorhiza magna subsp. kulikalonica
intro: Dactylorhiza magna subsp. kulikalonica, also known as Kulikalonica orchid, is a subspecies of the Dactylorhiza magna orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid. This plant is said to possess medicinal properties, with its roots containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza magna subsp. kulikalonica include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various cardiovascular conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and dried roots, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
